---
format:
  html:
    css:
      - ../course-page.css
      - ../style.css
    toc: false
    echo: false
    keep-hidden: true
    code-tools: false
    page-layout: full
---
<!-- This hidden span ensures Quarto loads the fontawesome package -->

[{{< fa solid calendar >}}]{style="display: none;"}

# Stuck on a Digital Research Problem? 
# Consult One of Our Experts.

![Consult an Expert](../assets/laptop-coding-help.png){width=100% fig-cap=""}

::::: {.course-page-layout .column-page}
::: course-content

Do you need advice on a specific problem, help choosing the right tools, or guidance from someone who has tackled a similar challenge before?
Researchers from across the UK can book a one-to-one discussion with one of our Digital Research Infrastructure specialists and get practical advice tailored to their project. 

It's completely **free to use** too! All the cost of the service is covered by the UKRI.

## Who can book a consultation?
Our consultancy service is open to anyone looking to develop their digital research skills or tackle a specific research challenge. 

Whether you're a PhD student taking your first steps into data-intensive research, a postdoctoral researcher exploring new methods, an academic leading a project, or a research group looking for specialist advice, we're here to help. 

We also welcome professional services staff supporting researchers, as well as colleagues from industry and the public sector who want to learn more about digital tools, data management, AI, bioinformatics, and other research technologies. 

Whatever your background or level of experience, our experts can help you find practical solutions and useful next steps.

## The expertise behind the Catalyst

Our consultancy team draws on expertise from seven UKRI-funded DaSH (Data Science in Health and Bioscience) projects, bringing together specialists from across the UK research community.

### Not Sure Where to Start?

If you're facing a digital research challenge but don't know what support you need, we'll help connect you with the right expertise.

```{=html}
<div id="consult-cards">

  <div class="consult-card">
    <div class="icon">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-image"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Working with Images or Visual Data?</h3>
    <p>Get support with microscopy, medical imaging, image analysis, visualisation, and tools for working with image-based datasets.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="consult-card">
    <div class="icon">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-brain"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Curious About AI?</h3>
    <p>Whether you're new to machine learning or applying AI in your research, we can help you explore methods, limitations, and practical next steps.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="consult-card">
    <div class="icon">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-database"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Managing Research Data?</h3>
    <p>Get guidance on data management plans, metadata, data sharing, FAIR principles, and organising your research data effectively.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="consult-card">
    <div class="icon">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-dna"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Working with Biological Data?</h3>
    <p>Connect with experts in genomics, transcriptomics, bioinformatics, and other data-intensive bioscience research.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="consult-card">
    <div class="icon">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-server"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Need More Computing Power?</h3>
    <p>Explore cloud computing, high-performance computing, and reproducible research workflows tailored to your project.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="consult-card">
    <div class="icon">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-microchip"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Collecting Complex Experimental Data?</h3>
    <p>Find support for sensor technologies, automated data collection, robotics, plant phenotyping, and other data-rich research systems.</p>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Why book a consultation?

Avoid spending days searching for the right software, reading documentation, or trying to work out whether a particular method is suitable for your data. A short conversation with somebody who already knows the field can save you a huge amount of time!
Our consultations are not formal consultancy projects and there's no expectation that you arrive with a fully formed question. They're simply an opportunity to discuss your research challenge with somebody who understands digital research methods and can help you move forward.

## Book today!

The consultancy service is funded by UKRI to support the research community, so don't be shy about using it!

Whether you're planning a new project, exploring AI, trying to improve your data management practices, wrestling with reproducibility, or just looking for advice on where to begin, we're here to help.

Book a consultation, ask your questions, and make the most of the expertise available through the UKRI Digital Research Skills Catalyst!
:::

::: event-details-sidebar
```{ojs}
//| eval: true
html`
<h3>Details</h3>

<div class="event-detail-item">
  <div class="event-detail-icon">
    <i class="fa-regular fa-calendar-days"></i>
  </div>
  <div class="event-detail-content">
    <p>Consultancy Open Until</p>
    <p>28th Feb 2027</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="event-detail-item">
  <div class="event-detail-icon">
    <i class="fa-regular fa-clock"></i>
  </div>
  <div class="event-detail-content">
    <p>Time Slots Available</p>
    <p>15–30 minutes</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="event-detail-item">
  <div class="event-detail-icon">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i>
  </div>
  <div class="event-detail-content">
    <p>Location</p>
    <p>Online</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="event-detail-item">
  <div class="event-detail-icon">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-sterling-sign"></i>
  </div>
  <div class="event-detail-content">
    <p>Fees</p>
    <p>Free</p>
  </div>
</div>

<a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfZzkuJIe5j5dADrvhOsB_CILZ_QExxxFESWph_69tGfLZw4Q/viewform?embedded=true" class="register-button">Book Now</a>

<div class="questions-section">
  <p>Questions?</p>
  <a href="mailto:research-digital-skills@york.ac.uk">research-digital-skills@york.ac.uk</a>
</div>
`
```
:::
:::::
